title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at SAP India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at SAP India
jsonLd.description:
SAP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SAP India:
SAP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India!
